_README: Static ZIP → NWS area name map for storm alert fan-out. Keys are 5-digit zip strings. Values are arrays of county/city names that appear in NWS `areaDesc`. The checkStormAlerts Cloud Function requires that a zip have at least one area match before it will send SMS. Populate this file with the zip codes the business actually serves before re-enabling storm alerts. An empty mapping makes the function refuse to send rather than fan out to all subscribers.
